message.reasoning_content:
The user is asking me to generate a JSON object for Stage 3 (lib-003-chain) of the library-chain workload. This stage should create a third library that depends on the second library, preserving the full call chain.

Looking at the existing structure:
- Stage 1 (lib-001-core): Created library-chain/core with index.js (exports add function) and sample.js (calls add)
- Stage 2 (lib-002-dependent): Created library-chain/feature with index.js (exports multiply that uses add from core) and sample.js (calls multiply)

For Stage 3 (lib-003-chain), I need to create a third library that depends on the second library (feature). The expected artifact is library-chain/pipeline (project).

So I need to create:
- library-chain/pipeline/index.js - exports a function that uses multiply from feature
- library-chain/pipeline/sample.js - calls the pipeline function

The call chain should be:
core (add) -> feature (multiply uses add) -> pipeline (uses multiply)

Let me create the JSON with the appropriate files.
